Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-1489 affecting package glib for versions less than 2.78.6-8
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-1489 affecting package glib for versions less than 2.78.6-8. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package glib is earlier than 2.78.6-8, affected by CVE-2026-1489
